54.reason: [This condition is unreachable because the loop condition is 'r != NULL'; when r becomes NULL, the loop exits, so this line never executes. Thus, new terms with lowest exponent won't be appended.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is unreachable because the loop condition is 'r != NULL'; when r becomes NULL, the loop exits, so this line never executes. Thus, new terms with lowest exponent won't be appended.]
